def solve(nums, queries)
  ans = []
  queries.each do |li, ri, threshold|
    freq = Hash.new(0)
    (li..ri).each do |i|
      num = nums[i]
      freq[num] += 1
    end
    max_freq = 0
    best_num = -1
    freq.each do |num, count|
      if count > max_freq || (count == max_freq && num < best_num)
        max_freq = count
        best_num = num
      end
    end
    ans << (max_freq >= threshold ? best_num : -1)
  end
  ans
end
